stories.title: Decompose src/worker/index.ts into route registry and middleware chain
acceptance_criteria: src/worker/index.ts is <80 lines (thin entry point)
Route registration extracted to src/worker/routes/registry.ts
Middleware chain extracted to src/worker/middleware/chain.ts
All imports updated across codebase
All unit and integration tests pass
stories.context: ALREADY COMPLETE — index.ts is 50 lines, registry.ts and chain.ts exist and work.

stories.title: Wire createRateLimiter and createClassifier factories into route handlers
acceptance_criteria: Route handlers in src/worker/routes/ call createRateLimiter(c.env.CACHE) instead of checkRateLimit(c.env.CACHE, ...)
Route handlers call createClassifier(c.env.AI) instead of classify(c.env.AI, ...)
TypeScript compiles cleanly
All 1362+ tests pass
stories.context: PARTIAL WORK EXISTS: createRateLimiter(cache) is in rate-limiter.ts:107, createClassifier(ai) is in classifier.ts:136. But grep shows ZERO route files import or call these factories — routes still use checkRateLimit() and classify() directly. Wire the factories into routes that use these. campaign-aggregator.ts already accepts KV as parameter — no changes needed there. Run: npx vitest run after changes.

stories.title: Update DI tests to use injected mocks via factory functions
acceptance_criteria: Tests for rate-limiter use createRateLimiter(mockKv) pattern
Tests for classifier use createClassifier(mockAi) pattern
No tests access env stubs directly for these modules
All tests pass
stories.context: After S-373a wires factories into routes, update the test files (rate-limiter.test.ts, classifier.test.ts, and any route tests that mock these) to use the factory pattern. Pattern: const limiter = createRateLimiter(mockKv); const result = await limiter(key, limit, window). Run: npx vitest run after changes.

stories.title: Fix newsletter.test.ts status 204 bug and verify coverage thresholds
acceptance_criteria: newsletter.test.ts line 151 uses status 200 (not 204) in Response constructor
All 1363 tests pass with 0 failures
Coverage meets 60% lines threshold
stories.context: KNOWN BUG: src/worker/routes/newsletter.test.ts:151 creates `new Response('', { status: 204 })` but miniflare's Response constructor rejects 204 as invalid. Fix: change to `new Response(null, { status: 204 })` (null body for 204) OR if the route actually returns 200, change the mock to status 200. Check what the actual newsletter unsubscribe handler returns. Run: npx vitest run after fix.

stories.title: Replace inline onclick handlers in admin translations with nonce scripts
acceptance_criteria: Zero inline event handlers (onclick, onsubmit, etc.) in src/worker/admin/translations.ts
All button actions use addEventListener in a <script nonce=...> block
CSP nonce parameter threaded through from admin middleware
Admin panel functionality preserved
TypeScript compiles and all tests pass
stories.context: src/worker/admin/translations.ts has 6 inline onclick handlers: saveSingle, autoTranslateSingle, deleteOverride, showImport, autoTranslateAll, bulkImport. Pattern to follow: see src/worker/admin/weights.ts which already uses <script nonce="${nonce}"> with addEventListener. The nonce comes from c.get('cspNonce'). Move all inline handlers to a single <script nonce="${nonce}"> block at the bottom of the template. Functions saveSingle, autoTranslateSingle, deleteOverride, showImport, autoTranslateAll, bulkImport must be defined inside that script block. Buttons need data attributes (data-lang, data-key) for the event listeners to read. Run: npx vitest run after changes.
